```python
def find_duplicates(lst):
    from collections import Counter
    counts = Counter(lst)
    return [item for item, count in counts.items() if count > 1]
```

```python
def find_duplicates(lst):
    from collections import Counter
    counts = Counter(lst)
    duplicates = [item for item, count in counts.items() if count > 1]
    return duplicates
```
